reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Roaches! Staff and managers are rude and disrespectful! Save your money

reviews.title: Homeless shelter
reviews.negatives:
The hotel looks nothing it shows
All the non smoking  rooms smell like cigarettes 
Dresser all chipped up as well as the head board
Pillows had stain on them
The tub was pealing all over it
Carpet was nasty and the walls were stained
This the first room 117
I request another room 
The lady said the tub was still clean just peeled paint
Next room was 113 
Same thing dresser chipped up as well as the head board
Pillows were no even a full size pillow
Bath tube had black marks in it and the carpet was filthy 
Stilled smelled like an ash trash
I had to force a guy at the desk name Porter to clean my room while I stood there
Wipe it down, change the sheets, cleaned the bath room and vacuum the floor
There was a hole in the wall
Because I couldn't for anywhere else 
So I was stuck
I still had to go buy 2 pillows, a blanket, 2 shower mats, 2 towels 2 can of frebree 
I washed up in the sink didn't trust the tub, put the mats on the floor
I laid in the bed with clothes, shoes and a Jacket on for 2 days and my GUN in my hand 
This was Crack motel, the environment wasn't safe
This by far has been the worst experience ever and the desk clerks were so nonchalant about my complaints 
I have a video but this review will not let me add it
It should be inspected and the SHUT DOWN!!!!
I REPEAT IT DOES NOT LOOK LIKE WHATS ADVERTISED

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Disgusting. Bed bugs. Another guest overdosed on site.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: I checked in at 1:30 the room and bathtub was full of hair and Grime. The toilet seat was broken. Me and partner told front desk and they said they didn’t have another room or staff to clean until 8 am the next morning. We tried looking for other rooms at another hotel but due to the holiday weekend they were booked. We had to go and buy cleaning products and clean the sink because the bathtub was too disgusting. The bed was hard and uncomfortable. It was a disaster. There was a honet nest above my room. I will never stay there agin

reviews.title: Disgusting hotel and agoda is trash
reviews.text: Walked and was hit immediately by the smell of cigarettes. The toilet had poop in it. The shower was uncleaned and falling apart. Saw a review say how the floor turned their white socks black/dirty and tested it with a towel, it has done the same as they said. It very much seemed like people went in to use the bathroom and sat on the bed since it wasn’t clean and the bed were lazily made. Agoda wouldn’t/hasn’t shortened or refund my stay, that partially being the hotel's fault for not contacting them back for 4 days at the time of this review. Do not go or at least don’t use a booking site.

reviews.title: Worse hotel ever
reviews.negatives:
Up keep of the over all place.
Broken bathroom faucet and toilet seat.And coffee maker. Front door of room with big gap all the way around
Bottom of bathtub dirty.
Metal bed and made a big boom noise.You sat on it.

reviews.title: So so
reviews.text:
We appreciated the effort in changing our former assigned room which smelled like cigarettes and had a very dirty floor. However, the new room reeked with urine - too tired to complain. 
Also, we felt that the sheets and pillowcases weren’t changed.

Breakfast option was terrible. We ate out.

Needless to say, we didn’t stay at all. We were able to find a hotel to accommodate our group.

The entire place is filthy which I had no problem telling him. I also think he thought because we are an African American couple the we would accept such accommodations WRONG

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives:
Rooms were terrible. Smoke smell in non smoking room. Comforter had blood drops on it.
The blanket had holes in it 
Took both to front desk and demanded another room.
The bath tub had soap scum all around the tub as if it was not being cleaned on a daily basis.
Headboard full of deep scratches.
Dresser also full of scratches 
The word that comes to mind is unsavory and I did not want to stay however all other hotels were booked.
My 4 friends and I were only in Hampton for one night and all the rooms were disgusting.
Sinks stopped up and no hot water until water ran for twenty minutes.
When reported to management I was asked to give up my key and I told them to use master key as I had a conference to attend at Hampton University.
I request a refund.
I was told when I called, rooms were inside. False advertising as all rooms opened to the outside.
Again I request a refund.

reviews.negatives: It was the dirtiest CHOICE hotel I have ever stayed at. Tried to get a refund and they wouldn’t do it. The tub looks like it has never been cleaned. The floors had pubic hair everywhere in the bathroom. The sheets and comforter had not been washed. The refrigerator did not work. Worse hotel experience ever in my 43 years of living. I had to go home and get my sheets and to take a shower cause there was no way me or my kids was going to take a shower in there. I was only there because my ac was broke but after leaving that hotel we went to comfort suits on hardycash Dr in Hampton.

reviews.title: Never again.
reviews.negatives: I would never, never stay at this place again! The neighborhood is terrible; the rooms are completely dirty! It had black mold in the bathtub of the first room and my keycard stopped working on the door, so we asked for another room and the front desk lady was very helpful and changed us; at the second room I found a black hair on the bathtub, a rouch under the bed and so much dust and dirty spread in the room!! I didn’t even wanted to sleep on the bed afraid that the sheets weren’t clean! Talked with the manager soon as he started his shift and he wasn’t very helpful; said that we have 15min after the check in to look around and cancel the stay if we want a full refund!! I ended up finding another hotel (what I highly recommend!!) for my second night. Will never stay at this place again!!

Employees chose  my door to smoke in front of.  Management knocked on my door twice in 10 minutes at 11am while I was hustling to leave.  The This place should be gutted and demolished.

reviews.positives: The location on Mercury Blvd was good.
reviews.negatives: The bathtub was filthy. They advertised that they had a microwave and a refrigerator in each room. Someone must have stolen the refrigerator because they brought us one the next day. Staff told me they didn’t provide microwaves in non smoking rooms. I guess I had a stupid look on my face.

reviews.title: Very bad stay
reviews.positives: Nothing is good very bad place
reviews.negatives: Nothing you can ever sleep the bad makes noise I couldn’t sleep

reviews.title: This was a basic low budget experience which would be fine if your expectations were exceptionally subpar.
reviews.negatives: The room was dirty. The floor wasn’t clean. The sink and shower drains stayed clogged.  I had zero confidence in the cleanliness of the room. The loud arguments, motorcycles right outside my door  kept me anxious and on edge.  I had to abandon these rooms and secure  new rooms at different hotels for our 2nd night.

reviews.title: Very poor and uncomfortable, and very disappointing.
reviews.positives: very poor. cold coffee with just sugar, no creamer none of the 3 days. We complained to the staff but to no avail.
reviews.negatives: Within 10 minutes after we checked in, we brough the staff member to room 117 to show him the condition of the room. The floor had not been swept. There was peanut shells, peices of what looked like animal food. The bath tub had not been cleaned properly. There were brown spot on the tub. We showed this to the staff member. He said he would get housekeeping in there to clean the room. No one came. My wife went back to the front desk approx. and hour later. The staff member was a different person. He told my wife, "why are you bringing this hostility to me, I was not hear earlier. No one came to clean the room the entire time that we stayed there I personally slipped in the bath tub, before I could even lather up with soap. There was no tub mat, and the bottom of the tub had no rough surface to stop you from slipping. I hit my elbow and it pained all that night. I just did not want to argue with anyone else, because we were treated like we did not matter. People were smoking "weed" outside of our door on the walkway for two of the nights that we stayed there.
